name: Broyeur-Connexion
description: Véhicule d'assaut bélier, conçu pour fracasser les fortifications. Sa rampe frontale percute avec la force de l'essaim entier.
prompt: Sci-fi grimdark cyberpunk, L'Omni-Réseau faction. Assault battering ram vehicle, massive angular reinforced front plate, brutalist dark grey tracked chassis, cold blue neural glow from vents, heavy impact dents on armor. Human head computing node visible in driver position. Charging forward, debris flying, cinematic lighting, highly detailed.
